title: Schema Title
description: A schema that defines an 'extends' and 'content' property

$schema.description: Schema reference for the base template to apply

extends.description: An optional object with optional arrays indicating the extensions to apply

bundles.description: An array of strings indicating the bundle templates to extend

frameworks.description: An array of strings indicating the framework templates to extend

languages.description: An array of strings indicating the languages templates to extend

content.description: The content of the object, an array of strings
